summary: Testing completed for multiple bug fixes: Match Odds 1 Back + 1 Lay column, Back/Lay header alignment, Admin/User Dashboard responsive design with hamburger menu, and explicit dashboard routes. All frontend features working correctly. Backend scheduler has async event loop issue in live match polling.

minor.issue: Async event loop error: 'Task got Future attached to a different loop' in check_live_matches_and_poll_async(). The scheduler is configured correctly for 2-minute polling but the async function fails due to event loop mismatch when using asyncio.run() in sync scheduler context.

action_items: Fix async event loop issue in backend scheduler's run_live_check function - consider using AsyncIOScheduler from apscheduler instead of BackgroundScheduler, or use a different approach for running async code in sync context
critical_code_review_comments: Backend scheduler uses asyncio.run() inside sync scheduler which causes event loop conflicts. Consider using apscheduler's AsyncIOScheduler or running the async code differently.

success_rate.backend: 95% - APIs working, scheduler has async issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend fixes verified working. Match Odds shows 1 Back + 1 Lay column. Bookmaker shows 3+3 columns. Admin and User dashboards are responsive with hamburger menu on mobile. /admin/dashboard and /user/dashboard routes work. Backend scheduler has async event loop issue that needs fixing.

match_odds_1_back_1_lay.details: Match Odds section shows 1 Back + 1 Lay column per team (2 teams = 2+2 buttons total)

back_lay_headers_aligned.details: Back and Lay headers are properly centered in Match Odds section

bookmaker_3_columns.details: Bookmaker section still shows 3 Back + 3 Lay columns per team (2 teams = 6+6 buttons total)

admin_dashboard_responsive.details: Admin Dashboard is responsive on mobile (390px width) with hamburger menu and collapsible sidebar

user_dashboard_responsive.details: User Dashboard is responsive on mobile (390px width) with hamburger menu and collapsible sidebar

admin_dashboard_route.details: /admin/dashboard route works correctly and loads Admin Dashboard

user_dashboard_route.details: /user/dashboard route works correctly and loads User Dashboard

backend_scheduler_live_polling.details: Scheduler is configured for 2-minute polling when live matches exist, but async function fails with event loop error

mocked_apis.details: All APIs are real - match data from database, odds from The Odds API
